Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector

Class UserManagement.Config

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector.UserManagement.Config
Enclosing class:

public static class UserManagement.Config extends Object
Configuration for the UserManagement.

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_STRATEGIES

      public static final Map<Class<?>,com.saperion.jcs.modules.api.LazyLoadingStrategy> DEFAULT_STRATEGIES

  • Constructor Details

    • Config

      public Config(com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector connector)
      Creates a new Config for the UserManagement usind a ClassicConnector instance to get the required settings. The ClassicConnector instance needs to be correctly initialized and logged-on to the backend.
      Parameters:
      connector - ClassicConnector instance

  • Method Details

    • setStrategy

      public UserManagement.Config setStrategy(Class<? extends com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserManagementItem> type, com.saperion.jcs.modules.api.LazyLoadingStrategy loadingStrategy)

    • build

      public UserManagement build() throws RemoteException, NotBoundException, com.saperion.exception.SaAuthenticationException, com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException
      Creates a UserManagement instance.
      Returns:
      UserManagement instance
      Throws:
      RemoteException - remote exception when connecting to the backend
      NotBoundException - server endpoint not found
      com.saperion.exception.SaAuthenticationException - user is not logged in
      com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException - system exception when connecting to the backend
